title: arenaria alpina
intro: Arenaria alpina, also known as alpine sandwort, is a low-growing, mat-forming plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Arenaria alpina is said to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
